error_signature: only getting values of 1 email in return
title: Only one email value returned in workflow
symptom: The workflow is only returning details for one email instead of multiple matching emails.
applies_when: Using a filter function to check for keywords
not_this_if: All emails are processed correctly without filtering
root_cause: The workflow is not set up to handle multiple email outputs due to the absence of a Split In Batches node, which is necessary to process each email individually.
fix_steps: Add a Split In Batches node after your filter function.
Set the 'Batch Size' to 1 in the Split In Batches node.
In your Google Sheets node, use direct field references for email details.
agent_instruction: Add a Split In Batches node and set the batch size to 1 to process each email individually.
